items.title_en: AI is flattening the jobs market for young people, says Sunak
items.title_zh: 苏纳克表示，人工智能正在使年轻人的就业市场变得平坦

items.desc_zh: 这位前总理表示，毕业生对获得入门级工作的担忧是有道理的。

items.title_en: Virginia judge blocks redistricting referendum result that boosted Democrats' election hopes
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州法官阻止重新划分选区的公投结果，该结果提振了民主党的选举希望
items.desc_en: Virginia voted by a slim margin on Tuesday to approve U.S. House district maps that could allow Democrats to flip four seats in the state this November.

items.title_en: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan leaving Trump administration: Pentagon
items.title_zh: 五角大楼：美国海军部长约翰·费兰离开特朗普政府
items.desc_en: Secretary of the Navy John Phelan is leaving the Trump administration "effective immediately," a spokesman for the Department of Defense said.
items.desc_zh: 美国国防部发言人表示，海军部长约翰·费兰将“立即”离开特朗普政府。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Tesla, IBM, ServiceNow, Southwest Airlines and more
items.title_zh: 盘后涨幅最大的股票：特斯拉、IBM、ServiceNow、西南航空等

items.desc_zh: 看看哪些股票在盘后出现大幅波动。

items.title_en: ServiceNow stock sinks 14% as subscription revenue takes hit from Iran war
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争订阅收入受到打击，ServiceNow 股价下跌 14%
items.desc_en: The software company beat expectations for earnings and revenue as it continued to expand its artificial intelligence offerings.
items.desc_zh: 随着该软件公司继续扩大其人工智能产品，其盈利和收入超出了预期。

items.title_en: IBM shares turn lower as company beats but opts to maintain guidance
items.title_zh: IBM 股价走低，公司表现出色，但选择维持指引
items.desc_en: Investors have been attuned to mainframe disruption threats from artificial intelligence, but IBM posted 51% growth in Z mainframe hardware revenue.
items.desc_zh: 投资者已经适应了人工智能对大型机的破坏威胁，但 IBM 公布 Z 大型机硬件收入增长了 51%。

items.title_en: Southwest Airlines forecasts quarterly earnings below estimates on higher fuel
items.title_zh: 由于燃油上涨，西南航空预计季度收益低于预期
items.desc_en: The airline reported that revenue in its first-quarter period rose nearly 13% to $7.25 billion.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司报告称，第一季度收入增长近 13%，达到 72.5 亿美元。

items.title_en: IBM CEO Krishna says Iran, other uncertainty is weighing on company's outlook
items.title_zh: IBM首席执行官克里希纳表示，伊朗和其他不确定性正在影响公司的前景
items.desc_en: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna said he expects others to quickly catch up to the power and performance of Anthropic's Mythos AI model.
items.desc_zh: IBM 首席执行官 Arvind Krishna 表示，他希望其他人能够迅速赶上 Anthropic 的 Mythos AI 模型的功能和性能。

items.title_en: Lululemon names former Nike exec Heidi O'Neill as new CEO
items.title_zh: Lululemon 任命前耐克高管 Heidi O'Neill 为新任首席执行官
items.desc_en: Lululemon announced on Wednesday that it has chosen former Nike executive Heidi O'Neill as its new CEO, effective in September.
items.desc_zh: Lululemon 周三宣布，公司已选择耐克前高管海蒂·奥尼尔 (Heidi O'Neill) 为其新任首席执行官，自 9 月起生效。

items.desc_en: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.
items.desc_zh: 冲突洞察组织（CIG）表示，其研究还显示了阿联酋参与的程度。

items.title_en: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
items.title_zh: 经过一天的疯狂外交后，特朗普为伊朗协议争取了时间
items.desc_en: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time
items.desc_zh: 美国总统的决定标志着他在几周内第二次放弃了升级战争的威胁，从而赢得了更多时间

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Trump recounts Tim Cook call to 'kiss my ass,' in stark look at White House dealmaking
items.title_zh: 特朗普重述蒂姆·库克的“亲我屁股”呼吁，赤裸裸地看待白宫交易
items.desc_en: Tech executives from Amazon, Apple, Google and Meta have dined with Trump and donated millions to his inauguration fund and the White House ballroom.
items.desc_zh: 来自亚马逊、苹果、谷歌和 Meta 的科技高管曾与特朗普共进晚餐，并向他的就职基金和白宫宴会厅捐赠了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
